'''dochazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uliginal|uliginal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uliginal|uliginal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazithi|dochazithi]] || [[word:dochaziji|dochaziji]] || [[word:dochazishi|dochazishi]] || [[word:dochaziki|dochaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazuthuthu|dochazuthuthu]] || [[word:dochazujuju|dochazujuju]] || [[word:dochazushushu|dochazushushu]] || [[word:dochazukuku|dochazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazuthu|dochazuthu]] || [[word:dochazuju|dochazuju]] || [[word:dochazushu|dochazushu]] || [[word:dochazuku|dochazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazufthuf|dochazufthuf]] || [[word:dochazufjuf|dochazufjuf]] || [[word:dochazufshuf|dochazufshuf]] || [[word:dochazufkuf|dochazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazethe|dochazethe]] || [[word:dochazeje|dochazeje]] || [[word:dochazeshe|dochazeshe]] || [[word:dochazeke|dochazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazothotho|dochazothotho]] || [[word:dochazojojo|dochazojojo]] || [[word:dochazoshosho|dochazoshosho]] || [[word:dochazokoko|dochazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazotho|dochazotho]] || [[word:dochazojo|dochazojo]] || [[word:dochazosho|dochazosho]] || [[word:dochazoko|dochazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazofthof|dochazofthof]] || [[word:dochazofjof|dochazofjof]] || [[word:dochazofshof|dochazofshof]] || [[word:dochazofkof|dochazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfthĂŻf|dochazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfjĂŻf|dochazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfshĂŻf|dochazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochazĂŻfkĂŻf|dochazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochazĂŠthĂŠ|dochazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazĂŠjĂŠ|dochazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazĂŠshĂŠ|dochazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dochazĂŠkĂŠ|dochazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochazathatha|dochazathatha]] || [[word:dochazajaja|dochazajaja]] || [[word:dochazashasha|dochazashasha]] || [[word:dochazakaka|dochazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochazatha|dochazatha]] || [[word:dochazaja|dochazaja]] || [[word:dochazasha|dochazasha]] || [[word:dochazaka|dochazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochazafthaf|dochazafthaf]] || [[word:dochazafjaf|dochazafjaf]] || [[word:dochazafshaf|dochazafshaf]] || [[word:dochazafkaf|dochazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochazasha|dochazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochazshĂ«asha|dochazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochazroasha|dochazroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochazmuasha|dochazmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochazyaasha|dochazyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochaznkshĂ«asha|godochaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochaznkroasha|godochaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochaznkmuasha|godochaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochaznkyaasha|godochaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachazasha|dochachazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachazshĂ«asha|dochachazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachazroasha|dochachazroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachazmuasha|dochachazmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachazyaasha|dochachazyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachaznkshĂ«asha|godochachaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachaznkroasha|godochachaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachaznkmuasha|godochachaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachaznkyaasha|godochachaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechĂŠzasha|dechĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechĂŠzshĂ«asha|dechĂŠzshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechĂŠzroasha|dechĂŠzroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechĂŠzmuasha|dechĂŠzmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechĂŠzyaasha|dechĂŠzyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechĂŠznkshĂ«asha|godechĂŠznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechĂŠznkroasha|godechĂŠznkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechĂŠznkmuasha|godechĂŠznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechĂŠznkyaasha|godechĂŠznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfazasha|dochfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfazshĂ«asha|dochfazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfazroasha|dochfazroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfazmuasha|dochfazmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfazyaasha|dochfazyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfaznkshĂ«asha|godochfaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfaznkroasha|godochfaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfaznkmuasha|godochfaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfaznkyaasha|godochfaznkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
